race.comment: STAR TERRITORY (5) is usually thereabouts and finds it hard to win but strikes a winnable assignment here. Won't be lacking anything in fitness after three runs back and all but won a race of similar quality two back, when beaten a nice. With extra fitness here and blinkers added, he looks the testing material from the good draw. PHANTOM PRINCE (2) resumed with a nice win at Stony Creek then returned to the same track and trip last time out. Disappointed that day but suited by the rise in trip here and might not have to get as far back from the low draw. MAGIC LEPRECHAUN (1) hit the frame two starts ago at this track but ran below par last time when a 36-length 10th at Yarra Valley. Best figures measure up nicely here. PURE RAIN (13) drifted back from an outside draw last time but found the line strongly to finish fourth in a performance that should measure up here. RAMPAZETTO (3) is a fascinating runner down from Darwin and could run a cheeky race off a nice trial.
